rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relationship to Educ. Code §33.206, which governs school safety training compliance and enforcement. The provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters.
quote: Sec. 33.206. COMPLIANCE; ENFORCEMENT. (a) In accordance with Chapter 552, Government Code, a school shall make available to the public proof of compliance for each person enrolled in, employed by, or volunteering for the school who is required to receive safety training described by Section 33.202.
_note: Rule text concerns school safety training compliance; no overlap with property tax homestead exemption provisions.
